tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsConnectionProfilesCreate
tools.description: Use this method to create a connection profile in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsConnectionProfilesDiscover
tools.description: Use this method to discover a connection profile. The discover API call exposes the data objects and metadata belonging to the profile. Typically, a request returns children data objects of a parent data object that's optionally supplied in the request.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsConnectionProfilesList
tools.description: Use this method to list connection profiles created in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsFetchStaticIps
tools.description: The FetchStaticIps API call exposes the static IP addresses used by Datastream.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsCreate
tools.description: Use this method to create a private connectivity configuration.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsList
tools.description: Use this method to list private connectivity configurations in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsRoutesCreate
tools.description: Use this method to create a route for a private connectivity configuration in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsRoutesList
tools.description: Use this method to list routes created for a private connectivity configuration in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsCreate
tools.description: Use this method to create a stream.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsDelete
tools.description: Use this method to delete a stream.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsList
tools.description: Use this method to list streams in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsObjectsGet
tools.description: Use this method to get details about a stream object.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsObjectsList
tools.description: Use this method to list the objects of a specific stream.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsObjectsLookup
tools.description: Use this method to look up a stream object by its source object identifier.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsObjectsStartBackfillJob
tools.description: Use this method to start a backfill job for the specified stream object.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsObjectsStopBackfillJob
tools.description: Use this method to stop a backfill job for the specified stream object.

tools.name: projects.datastreamProjectsLocationsStreamsPatch
tools.description: Use this method to update the configuration of a stream.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
